channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Healthy LaMelo Ball shines in 1st game since January, scoring 34 points in Hornets' win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — LaMelo Ball looked like the superstar that nagging ankle injuries have kept him from being for most of the last two seasons in Charlotte’s opener on Wednesday night. Playing in a regular-season game for the first time since Jan.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Riley Gaines tells Georgia Trump rally 'we need Jesus,' days after Harris clashed with Christian protesters
item.description: Former NCAA swimmer and OutKick contributor Riley Gaines said "we all need Jesus and his grace" at a Trump rally in Georgia on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Embiid drawing criticism for sitting out 76ers' opener as part of health plan to reach the playoffs
item.description: Joel Embiid’s absence from the Philadelphia 76ers’ season opener against Milwaukee is simply part of the team’s plan to keep the two-time NBA scoring champion on track for a healthy season.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hybricon Games enters third season
item.description: “Every year before the Hybricon Games, I’m like, ‘I’m never doing that again.’ But immediately after, I want more,” says Austen Alexander.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa practices for the first time since suffering a concussion in Week 2
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tyreek Hill couldn't hide his excitement catching the football from Tua Tagovailoa on Wednesday for the first time in over a month. “I just had a big cheese on my face,” Hill said. “It just felt so good.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How Fernando Valenzuela changed Los Angeles forever
item.description: The historic impact Fernando Valenzuela made on the city of Los Angeles traces its roots to the 1950s, according to renounced sports commentator Roy Firestone.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, Mexican-born pitcher whose feats for Dodgers fueled 'Fernandomania,' dies at 63
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died. He was 63.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks captain not pleased after Canucks score 4 first-period goals in 6-3 win over Chicago
item.description: Danton Heinen scored two of Vancouver's four first-period goals, and the Canucks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-3 on Tuesday night for their third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers WR Brandon Aiyuk to miss season with knee injury
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the remainder of the 2024 season after suffering a knee injury in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday. Head coach Kyle Shanahan reported that he tore the MCL and ACL in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: WNBA players union decides to opt out of current collective bargaining agreement
item.description: The current CBA will still cover the 2025 season so the two sides have a year to negotiate a new agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: FINAL | Bucs 31, Ravens 41
item.description: In the early 2000s, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and the Baltimore Ravens were synonymous with great defense in the NFL, but now they are playing a different brand of football.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Ricky Pearsall gives 49ers a lift with his return. But they lose Brandon Aiyuk to a knee injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers got a lift from rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall making his NFL debut exactly 50 days after being shot in the chest but might have lost starting receiver Brandon Aiyuk to a significant knee injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cooper scores in his Bills debut and Allen shakes off a sluggish start in 34-10 rout of Titans
item.description: It didn’t take Amari Cooper long to get the hang of Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills' offense — even when the quarterback was changing plays at the line of scrimmage.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — With their season on the line, the Minnesota Lynx did just enough to stave off elimination and force a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals. Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Lynx beat the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5
